business.name: Bloom Aesthetics Clinic
business.location: Available on request; consultations can be virtual or in-clinic

services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles. Commonly used for forehead lines, frown lines, and crow's feet.
services.aftercare: Avoid lying down for 4 hours, no heavy exercise same day

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Hyaluronic acid fillers used to restore volume, define lips, cheeks, and jawline.
services.aftercare: Avoid extreme heat and pressure on treated areas for 24 hours

services.name: Consultation
services.description: A free, no-obligation consultation with a qualified aesthetic practitioner to discuss your goals and suitable treatments.

services.name: Skin Boosters
services.description: Injectable hydration treatment to improve skin texture and radiance.

services.name: Chemical Peels
services.description: Superficial peels to improve skin tone, texture, and reduce pigmentation.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for cancellations or rescheduling
booking.late_cancellation_fee: 50% of treatment cost may be charged for cancellations under 24 hours
booking.deposits: A deposit may be required to secure your booking
booking.availability: Subject to practitioner availability; book early for peak times

faqs.question: Do I need a consultation before treatment?
faqs.answer: A free consultation is recommended and available before any first treatment. It helps our practitioner understand your goals and recommend the most suitable option.

faqs.question: How long do results last?
faqs.answer: Botox results typically last 3–6 months. Filler results vary by area and can last 6–18 months. We recommend follow-up treatments to maintain results.

faqs.question: Is it painful?
faqs.answer: Most clients experience minimal discomfort. A topical numbing cream can be applied before treatment to improve comfort.

faqs.question: Are treatments safe?
faqs.answer: All treatments are performed by qualified aesthetic practitioners. We prioritise patient safety and follow all regulatory guidelines.

faqs.question: Can I book same-day?
faqs.answer: Same-day bookings may be available subject to practitioner availability. We recommend booking in advance to secure your preferred time.

escalation_triggers: medical question or concern (allergies, contraindications, medications)
more than 2 questions the AI cannot answer from the SOP
explicit request to speak to a human
lead_qualification_questions: Which treatment are you most interested in — Botox, Fillers, or something else?
Have you had aesthetic treatments before, or would this be your first time?
Are you looking to book for yourself, or making an enquiry on behalf of someone else?
